name: Lombard
description: Lombard is the onchain Bitcoin company that turns idle BTC into productive capital, giving holders access to yield opportunities across DeFi without security compromises. Lombard's products include LBTC (yield-bearing BTC), BTC.b (permissionless bridged BTC), and a suite of automated Bitcoin yield strategies. The protocol is secured by a consortium of 15 leading crypto institutions, including OKX, Kraken, Galaxy, DCG, and Wintermute.
